name: Breakfast Castle Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the White Castle cheeseburgers in half and place them in a 13-inch x 9-inch baking dish or pan.
2. Mix all ingredients (except the cheese) until frothy in a bowl.
3. Pour over the White Castles.
4. Sprinkle with taco cheese and paprika.
5. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight or until thoroughly chilled.
6. Bake at 350°F uncovered for 40-45 minutes, or until the custard is set.
7. Serve hot or cold.
